notes: Passes 1-6 completed: scaffold through runtime mount cutover.
Passes 7-14 completed route ownership; passes 15-25 completed controller ownership.
Pass 26 baselined ownership guardrails via registry-driven parity checks for upcoming model/service/repository migration.
Pass 27 converted first model ownership batch (16 School models) from wrappers to package-owned implementations with core contract bridging.
Pass 28 converted remaining School models and repositories to package-owned implementations.
Pass 29 and Pass 30 converted remaining School services to package-owned implementations.
Pass 31 prunes redundant core School domain artifacts from MVC/services/school and MVC/views/school in the package repository.
Pass 32 completed certification + installability verification and updated tests for package route-module resolution diagnostics.
Pass 33 recorded runtime mount and auth middleware recovery handoff for next-stage smoke validation.
Pass 34 added runtime smoke checklist for package-loader mount, auth middleware behavior, and primary school page accessibility.
Pass 35 added finalization handoff for completion evidence collection and close-out transition.
Pass 36 started PTE-like parity planning for manifest depth, scripts/tests inventory, and package operational surface.
Pass 37 added school package script/test support surface seeding for package-level parity execution planning.
Pass 38 added package-local school script shims to keep script execution available from package context.
Pass 39 seeded school manifest role/section/symbol declarations from existing school data with adoptExisting strategy.
School package runtime now owns all school controllers; shared dependencies are bridged via packages/school/MVC/services/school/schoolCoreContracts.js where applicable.
Pass 40 completed access operation closure plus menu/dashboard follow-up for school package nav and section coverage.
Pass 41 added a persistent smoke runbook script with startup progress logging and guarded route/menu checks for `/school` and teacher/staff entry points.

Pass 41 verification run completed: unauth checks for `/school`, `/school/students`, `/school/teachers`, `/school/staff`, and `/dashboard/section-nav/SCHOOL` return `302 /login`; loader route metric evidence shows `requested=1 | prepared=1 | mounted=1 | failed=0` and package summary `enabled=2 | loaded=2 | failed=0`.

Pass 42 smoke hardening added auth-session cookie bootstrap support (`SCHOOL_SMOKE_COOKIE`, `--cookie`, `--cookie-file`) so menu/dashboard validation can run in environments where credentials are not script-friendly.

Pass 43 completed auth-session smoke execution on port 3100 with `--cookie="auth_token=<jwt>`: unauth route checks returned expected 302 `/login`; auth checks for `/school`, `/school/students`, `/school/teachers`, `/school/staff`, and `/dashboard/section-nav/SCHOOL` passed with dashboard status 200 and valid menu links.

Pass 43 completed with explicit external app startup + `--no-server-start` smoke path in local test environment; unauth and auth routes passed and menu probe reported teachersLink=true and staffLink=true.
Pass 43 closeout run captured route/mount evidence in app startup logs: `requested=1 | prepared=1 | mounted=1 | failed=0` and `Package loader finished ... enabled=2 | loaded=2 | failed=0`.
Pass 43 run captured loader evidence: school route mount `requested=1 | prepared=1 | mounted=1 | failed=0` and package summary `enabled=2 | loaded=2 | failed=0`.
